title: Weekend filter option for date(s) and timelines
excerpt: Filtering date and timeline columns by weekends would be beneficial to us. We want to review the filtered table over the week so we can share it with the teams before the upcoming weekend, so they’re aware of the upcomin…

posts.author: tsentis (Thomas Sentis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Filtering date and timeline columns by weekends would be beneficial to us. We want to review the filtered table over the week so we can share it with the teams before the upcoming weekend, so they’re aware of the upcoming projects in their area.

You could add it to for example the selection of the “is on or after” filter items like upcoming weekend and next weekend. Or to make it more robust use multi-selection with 3 criteria’s like 1. “is on or after” 2. “This”,Next" or “Last” 3. “Monday”, “Tuesday”, etc.
